arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s second against third in the Premier League tonight as Arsenal travel to Nottingham Forest with both sides aiming to bounce back from defeat. The Gunners’ title hopes were massively dented as they narrowly lost at home to London rivals West Ham. Myles Lewis-Skelly is suspended after being sent off for the second time this […] The post Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Nottingham Forest vs Arsenal: TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Arsenal will hope to narrow Liverpool's 11-point lead at the top of the Premier League table when they travel to the City Ground to face a hot-on-their-heels Nottingham Forest on Wednesday evening

We could also clinch consecutive away league wins at Forest for the first time since 1990, but no team has left the City Ground with three points since October as Nuno Espirito Santo’s team continue to impress as they aim to finish the campaign in the same way they've started. Nottingham Forest have lost seven of their last eight Premier League games against us, with the exception being a 1-0 home win in May 2023.
